vital_signs.notes: Elevated heart rate during chest pain episode

medical_records.chief_complaint: Persistent cough and fever for 3 days
medical_records.treatment_notes: Prescribed antibiotics and rest. Follow up in 1 week.

medical_records.chief_complaint: Itchy red rash on arms and neck
medical_records.treatment_notes: Prescribed topical corticosteroid cream. Avoid known irritants.
Started on Amlodipine 5mg daily. Lifestyle modifications discussed. Low-sodium diet recommended.

medical_records.chief_complaint: Intermittent chest pain, worsened with exertion
medical_records.treatment_notes: ECG performed. Low-dose aspirin started. Referred for stress test at City General Hospital.
HbA1c elevated. Metformin dose adjusted to 1000mg BID. Diet counseling provided.

medical_records.chief_complaint: Persistent dry cough and shortness of breath for 2 weeks
medical_records.treatment_notes: Spirometry showed mild obstruction. Salbutamol inhaler prescribed. Montelukast added.

medical_records.chief_complaint: Red, irritated eyes with blurry vision for 3 days
medical_records.treatment_notes: Antihistamine eye drops prescribed. Oral cetirizine for systemic relief. Avoid allergens.
